reference: My three-year-old son saw a gastrointestinal specialist and had a barium enema, which was normal. He is severely constipated all the time. We have tried Ex-Lax, Miralax, mineral oil, and lactulose. He is a happy kid when he has all the stool out, but he is miserable when trying to poop. Lately, he has been trying to poop and then would vomit. I don't know what to do.
text: My three-year-old son saw a gastrointestinal specialist and had a barium enema, which was normal. He is severely constipated all the time. We have tried Ex-Lax, Miralax, mineral oil, and Lactulose. He is a happy kid when he has all his stool out, but he is miserable when trying to poop. Lately he has been trying to poop and then would vomit. I don't know what to do.
